info: Good day ran pacers thursday and met some new people, a future army ranger who had some crazy stories and physique and a swimmer training for a tri which was cool. Decided to make this updates page youre reading right now! Then decided to buy a thinkcrentre and bought it plus a charger now on the hunt for SSDS yipee!

info:: Finished my reread of peace talks. Went to a so called tech meetup that really was a hodgebodge of people not in tech got back and was too tired to run but i am feeling super motivated to apply to new jobs and am gonna ping aome of my ex deloitte peeps to get the ball rolling because i can fucking crack this market.

info: Ran for 10 miles in the first time that feels like forever. The first 2-4 miles were dull creshdending pain that was getting to agony but my expeicne with this being temporary was true and legs really felt good at the end. Picked up stoner by john wilaims on a whim and read it in bascially two sittings today, and may go to the book club tmmrw if I can wake up for it. Also hit up one of my ex-deloitte coworkers for advice and got some really helpful stuff. Good day
